arts.ttl: Roma Haven’t Gotten a Lot from Late Summer Signings
arts.sum: Roma shored up their backline in peculiar fashion last summer, bringing in two veteran defenders after deadline day since they were out of contract, Mats Hummels and Mario Hermoso, but they haven't panned as they hoped.
